steps.title: Use the action clue
steps.content: The narrator says, "I place my keys on the bowl." The context describes setting keys down in a location, not opening something, taking something away, or ordering items by rank.

steps.title: Match the physical action
steps.content: Choice A means to open a lock, which does not fit setting keys on a bowl. Choice C means to take away, the opposite of the action described. Choice D means to order by grade or position, which is unrelated. The remaining choice means to set something somewhere. The answer is B.
